blockingIssues.description: The Central Skills install dialog offers a Copy method, but the selected install method is never passed through the frontend store or Rust command layer, so every install still uses the symlink-only path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny review/validator procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or provide a documented fallback path when they cannot.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this validation run, both Task invocations for `platform-view-page` and `central-skills-view` exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to perform the reviews manually. The same failure mode was already recorded in foundation scrutiny round 2.
